title: iSyncYou Evidence Manifest
description: A machine-readable record that links requirements to the executed evidence which verifies them. It closes the loop: requirements (docs/requirements) -> tests -> this manifest.

manifest_version.description: Schema major version of this manifest.

commit.description: The git commit the evidence was produced against.

requirement.description: The requirement this evidence verifies (must exist in docs/requirements).

method.description: How the evidence was produced. 'probe' = a live check against a real account.

command.description: The exact command that produced the evidence.

result.description: The observed outcome. A manifest may record failures honestly.

evidence.description: A captured excerpt of the real output.

artifact.description: Path or URL to a stored artifact (log, report, screenshot).
